summary: Completed backend testing of Weekly Email Reports via Resend feature. All 14 tests passed (100%). Email endpoints working correctly: send-test returns email_id, send-weekly-digest successfully sends to verified email, weekly digest scheduled task registered with cron 0 10 * * 1 (Mondays at 10 AM UTC). Resend API key properly configured.
passed_tests: Email router is registered and accessible at /api/email
POST /api/email/send-test with valid API key sends email successfully
Task send_weekly_email_digest is registered in TaskRegistry
Scheduled task has correct schedule: 0 10 * * 1 (Monday 10 AM UTC)
Resend API key is configured and working
critical_code_review_comments: EmailService correctly uses async/await with asyncio.to_thread for Resend SDK
Proper error handling in email_service.py with logging
Weekly digest HTML template is well-formatted with inline CSS for email compatibility
Scheduled task correctly queries for latest weekly report before sending
API key authentication properly implemented on all admin email endpoints
test_credentials: API Key: vs_automation_key_2024, Verified Resend email: jenkinslisa1978@gmail.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Email Reports feature fully tested. Three email endpoints working: POST /api/email/send-test (sends test email), POST /api/email/send-weekly-digest (sends to specific user), POST /api/email/send-weekly-digest-all (sends to all subscribers). Subscription status endpoints require user authentication. Task 'send_weekly_email_digest' scheduled for Monday 10 AM UTC. Resend API key configured at backend/.env (RESEND_API_KEY). Note: Resend free tier only allows sending to verified email (jenkinslisa1978@gmail.com).
